name: Tableau
description: Sync Tableau workbooks, views, and datasources from Tableau Server or Tableau Cloud into the Shielva knowledge base.

install_fields.label: Server URL
install_fields.help: The base URL of your Tableau Server or Tableau Cloud instance (e.g. https://10ax.online.tableau.com).

install_fields.label: Personal Access Token Name
install_fields.help: The name of the Personal Access Token created in your Tableau account settings.

install_fields.label: Personal Access Token Secret
install_fields.help: The secret value of the Personal Access Token. This is only shown once at creation time.

install_fields.label: Site Name
install_fields.help: The content URL of the Tableau site (leave blank for the default site on Tableau Server).

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate PAT credentials by signing in to the Tableau REST API.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Sign in and retrieve current site info, returning HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Content
methods.description: Sign in then fetch workbooks, views, and datasources; normalize each to ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: List Workbooks
methods.description: Return all workbooks for the current site (auto-paginated).

methods.name: List Views
methods.description: Return all views for the current site (auto-paginated).

methods.name: List Datasources
methods.description: Return all datasources for the current site (auto-paginated).

methods.name: List Users
methods.description: Return all users for the current site (auto-paginated).

methods.name: List Projects
methods.description: Return all projects for the current site.
